title: Turn This Into A Faceless Niche

transcript.text: This YouTube channel has only posted one video and it's gotten him 400,000 views, instantly getting him monetized and generated him 1,000 bucks. So, the channel itself is not faceless, but here's how I'm going to copy it using AI. First, let's use rtwb.ai to understand why the channel exploded. It will break down its scripts, thumbnails, and titles. And then, using niche bending, find open niches like that. The whole process literally took me 15 minutes and I got the niche, the script skeleton, and the first 10 ideas. Walter's now working on the script thanks to rtwb.ai. By the way, I'm going to share this entire system in open free access to rtwb.ai to anyone who shows up to my 3-day live event. I'm going to help you find niche, build the asset and team, and prepare it for acquisition, all in less than 72 hours. Comment foundry and I'll send you the link to sign up for this event.
